name: EECS Master of Engineering (MEng)
highlight: Research-heavy programme with strong AI and systems groups; MEng open to MIT undergrads.

name: MS in Computer Science
highlight: Specialization tracks in AI, HCI, Systems; Silicon Valley network is unmatched.

name: MSCS / MSAI / MCDS
highlight: Top-ranked CS school; industry pipeline and specialized tracks for every niche.

name: MEng in EECS / MS in CS
highlight: Bay Area access and strong theory tradition; MEng is one-year and course-based.

name: MSE in Computer Science
highlight: Small, research-focused; often a feeder into Princeton's PhD programme.

name: MS in Computer Science
highlight: Strong systems and databases programme; Grainger engineering network.

name: MEng in Computer Science
highlight: Fast 2-semester option; Ithaca or Cornell Tech NYC campus.

name: MS in Computer Science & Engineering
highlight: Seattle location near Amazon and Microsoft; highly competitive admissions.

name: MS in Computer Science (incl. OMSCS online)
highlight: OMSCS is affordable and same-diploma as on-campus; strong in ML and systems.

name: MS in Computer Science
highlight: Track-based programme; strong AI and finance-adjacent tech scene.

name: MS in Computer Science / MSCSO
highlight: Austin tech scene; MSCSO online is exceptional value for working students.

name: MS in Computer Science & Engineering
highlight: Strong systems and ML; San Diego's startup ecosystem is growing quickly.

name: MS in Computer Science
highlight: Large CS school in LA; entertainment, gaming, and robotics adjacencies.

name: MS in Computer Science
highlight: Manhattan campus; strong links to finance, fintech, and media tech.

name: Align MS in Computer Science
highlight: Co-op track lets career-switchers intern for 6 months at a company.

name: MS in Computer Science / MIDS
highlight: Smaller cohort; MIDS data-science track is popular for career pivots.

name: MSE in Computer Science & Engineering
highlight: Strong engineering ecosystem with mobility and automotive tech proximity.

name: MComp in Computer Science / MSc in AI / MSc in Digital Financial Technology
highlight: Flagship CS school in Asia; AI and FinTech tracks are especially competitive.

name: MSc in AI / Data Science / FinTech
highlight: Industry-partnership projects with Alibaba, ByteDance and regional banks.

name: Master of Engineering (Computer Science)
university: Singapore University of Technology and Design
highlight: MIT-inspired curriculum; small cohort, hands-on project-based learning.

name: MITB (Master of IT in Business)
highlight: Business-IT crossover; a strong path from CS into consulting or finance.

name: MSc in Computer Science
highlight: Established programme with focused tracks in AI, multimedia and data science.

name: MSc in Big Data Technology / MSc in AI
university: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
highlight: CS ranks top in Asia; Big Data Technology is highly career-oriented.

name: MSc in Computer Science
university: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
highlight: Specialization tracks in AI, FinTech and Multimedia; strong research output.

name: MSc in Information Technology
highlight: Application-oriented programme suitable for pivoting into IT roles.

name: MSc in Computer Science
highlight: Rising programme with strong value-for-money positioning.

name: MSc in Computer Science
highlight: Top-10 global CS at near-zero tuition; reading-level German helps daily life.

name: MSc in Computer Science / Data Science
highlight: English-taught programme in Lausanne; strong AI and systems groups.

name: MSc in Computer Science
highlight: Intense one-year taught programme; a great platform for career pivots.

name: MPhil in Advanced Computer Science
highlight: Research-track MPhil; a strong runway into a PhD.

name: MSc in Computing (Science)
highlight: London location with strong FinTech, AI and quant-trading links.

name: MSc in Informatics
highlight: Nearly free tuition; German engineering rigor and strong industry links.

name: MSc in Computer Science (ICT Innovation)
highlight: Erasmus Mundus joint-campus option across top European schools.

name: MSc in Computer Science
highlight: English-taught; core of the Dutch tech ecosystem near Amsterdam.

name: MSc in Artificial Intelligence
highlight: Historic AI programme; coursework is intense but well-regarded by industry.

name: MSc in Machine Learning / MSc CS
highlight: Close ties with DeepMind and London's finance and health-tech scene.

name: MSc in Computer Science
highlight: Strong in systems and embedded computing; low cost of study.
